_comment: Maps each CCTV clip to its store, camera role, and recording start time. OSD timestamps extracted from actual footage frames.

clips.notes: Entry/exit glass door. Camera looks DOWN from inside store at entry threshold. Entry line at x=660 — left of line is mall corridor (outside), right is inside store. Process FIRST so ENTRY events anchor sessions before floor events arrive. OSD: 10/04/2026 20:09:50 visible in CAM 5 (closest timestamp anchor).
Skincare wall — top/back wall of store. Farmstay, TFS, Good Vibes, Derma Co, Minimalist, Aqualogy, DERMDOC. Round fragrance/nail island display in foreground. OSD confirmed: 10/04/2026 20:10:29.

Makeup/cosmetics wall — bottom/front wall of store. Alps, L'Oreal, 6Mars, Swiss Beauty, Lakme, FacesCanada, Maybelline. Makeup trial unit left side. Overlaps with CAM_FLOOR_01 at makeup trial unit area — Re-ID deduplication active. OSD confirmed: 10/04/2026 20:10:05.

Billing counter with laptop/POS. Stockroom with inventory boxes visible center-background (is_staff_zone). 55-inch LED Accessories display panel on right side of frame. Process after floor cameras. OSD confirmed: 10/04/2026 20:09:50.
Left entry glass panel. Entry line at x=640 — tune after first pipeline run. Process FIRST. Primary entry camera — most customer traffic expected here.
Right entry glass panel. Secondary entry point. Entry line at x=640 — adjust independently if right panel geometry differs from left.
Main FOH floor. Covers GONDOLA_ZONE (left), FLOOR_CENTER (middle), MAKEUP_ZONE (right). Process after entry cameras.
Cash counter / POS area. BOH staff-only zone visible at very top of frame (y<150) — persons in this strip auto-classified is_staff=True. Process after floor camera.
